sentences.arabic: لَاحَظَتْ شَهَدُ أَنَّ حَقِيبَتَهَا أَصْبَحَتْ ثَقِيلَةً جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Shahad je primijetila da joj je torba postala veoma teška.
sentences.translationEn: Shahad noticed that her bag had become very heavy.

sentences.translation: Otvorila je torbu i pogledala unutra.
sentences.translationEn: She opened the bag and looked inside.

sentences.translation: Pronašla je pet knjiga koje nisu njene.
sentences.translationEn: She found five books that were not hers.

sentences.arabic: ادَّعَى أَخُوهَا أَنَّهُ وَضَعَهَا بِالْخَطَأِ فِي حَقِيبَتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Njen brat je tvrdio da ih je greškom stavio u njenu torbu.
sentences.translationEn: Her brother claimed he had put them in her bag by mistake.

sentences.arabic: أَعَادَتْ شَهَدُ الْكُتُبَ إِلَيْهِ وَضَحِكَا مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Shahad mu je vratila knjige i nasmijali su se zajedno.
sentences.translationEn: Shahad returned the books to him and they laughed together.
